title: "Match" automation feature - add ability to connect based on Item ID and Auto Number columns
excerpt:
I submitted this already via the “Submit a Ticket” > “I have a feature request” dropdown within my account but was encouraged to post here as well. 
  
I know these automations are still in Beta, but it would be an aweso…

posts.author: NickNourishandSow (Nick Mitchell)
posts.cookedHtml:
I submitted this already via the “Submit a Ticket” > “I have a feature request” dropdown within my account but was encouraged to post here as well.

image1664×282 34.5 KB

I know these automations are still in Beta, but it would be an awesome feature to be able to connect items together by referencing the Item ID and/or Auto Number columns in the automation.

For example, I handle a lot of events. I would like to auto-assign an event a number (ie. Item ID or Auto Number with a prefix). Then, when my team fills out forms (event feedback, post-event inventory, etc.) they would reference the “Event ID” (the Item ID or Auto Number) and the new items submitted through forms would automatically link to the Event. That way, all feedback, inventory tracking, and whatever else I want to connect to my event can automatically be connected by simply referencing the Event ID in the form submission. I’m certain this has so many use cases and it would be awesome to see!

PS I know I can accomplish this by typing a number in for each event and using it in the same automation, but using an auto-generated number would be a game changer!!

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @NickNourishandSow

This app on the marketplace https://monday.com/marketplace/17 generates a unique and highly configurable number for each new item on a board. The generated ID is stored in a text column and can be used in the MATCH automations.

posts.author: Nir-Jetpack (Nir @ Jetpack Team)
posts.cookedHtml:
@NickNourishandSow checkout VLOOKUP app that can help you with that. We just added conditional linking and Subitems support.

Let me know if you have any question.

posts.author: NaomiCoe (Naomi Coe)
posts.cookedHtml: Adding that we also have run into this issue! We’re using Monday to track warranties and have issued the item ID as a reference number. We need to use a match automation using the item id to connect any subsequent claims back to the original warranty registration.

posts.author: Fantasy-Media-Team (Fantasy Media Team)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @NaomiCoe & @NickNourishandSow

We’ve developed an app called Advanced Item Link & Match. It was built to address monday’s native solution shortcomings. Amongst other things it also allows to connect via item ID and auto number. You can also use multiple conditions for a more accurate matching if relevant.

2 conditions example (you can use 1-4 conditions for matching) -

Screenshot 2024-02-05 at 17.08.592164×520 37.7 KB

You can find it in the monday.com app marketplace in the platform.
Hope that helps!

posts.author: SecretBaguette (Olivier Laude)
posts.cookedHtml: I would love to get an update on this feature being developed natively too. Aware some app exist, but at additional costs and in many case not compatible with data compliance in our country.

posts.author: popjaco (Poppy)
posts.cookedHtml: Surely this is a no brainer - we need this for exactly the same workflow (event IDs and event feedback) but also for many other workflows (matching project budgets to project IDs)
